name: Nagi "Owl" Kengamine
description:
Nagi is a main protagonist from the series Deadman Wonderland. He is a human imbued with blood manipulating powers making him a "Deadman", one of a handful of survivors of the mysterious Tokyo Earthquake. His life prior is unknown but during his incarceration into Deadman Wonderland, he was in a relationship with an unnamed female Deadman and later forced to fight her in the underground deathmatch Carnival Corpse. Upon his refusal the two were punished and the girl was killed along with their unborn child while he had his vocal cords removed. Ever since, he vowed to rebel against the system there and formed the group called Scar Chain.

Nagi is a young man who held a frail posture. He carried a gentle face with long, curly dark brown hair, with strands covering his cheeks and one strand between his brown eyes. He had a scar on his neck at the height of his vocal cords. Nagi wore a black sweater, light gray pants and geta-sandals. He had a dark green scarf that he wore at all times. He kept a similar scarf that belonged to his late wife around his waist. This scarf is light brown with a motif. Despite being human.

His only known power is his Branch of Sin called "Owl Eyeball", letting him form his blood into orbs full of condensed air which he can detonate and explode with great force even from a distance.
creator: AnimeMan1993
